titles.title: ROBINHOOD Act of 2026
Redistribution Of Billions by Instituting New High-income Obligations on Overlooked Debt Act of 2026
ROBINHOOD Act of 2026
A bill to amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to ensure that high net-worth individuals cannot avoid paying taxes on their income and assets.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance.
